{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/nautilus/composite-skills-agents-companion-mentors/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. composite-skills-agents-companion-mentors

_Файлов:_ 4

h2. Содержание

* [00-question-multiple-mentors.md|00-question-multiple-mentors.md] — 
* [01-yogi-metaphor.md|01-yogi-metaphor.md] — > [!IMPORTANT]
* [02-what-was-missing-in-paper-6.md|02-what-was-missing-in-paper-6.md] — > [!WARNING]
* [03-the-spectrum.md|03-the-spectrum.md] — > [!WARNING]



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [README|docs/nautilus/community-discussions/voiceless-contributors/README.md] (сходство 0.24)

* [README|docs/nautilus/multi-tier-architecture/README.md] (сходство 0.22)
